summary: EC-FEED-016 has live, contradictory text in two places. Sprint 4 amendment (line 695) still says 'EditorPane receives focusedBlockId: null and generates a default empty paragraph block on its own initiative'. Sprint 5 supersedes this in REQ-FEED-031 (line 1027) and the catalog at line 1115, but the original prose was never neutralized.

detail.snippet:
L695 (Sprint 4 EC-FEED-016): EditorPane receives `focusedBlockId: null` and generates a default empty paragraph block on its own initiative.

L1115 (Sprint 5 EC-FEED-016 amendment): FeedRow 側で UUID v4 発番の空 paragraph 1 件を fallback として採用し dispatchFocusBlock を発火 (REQ-FEED-031)

L1120-1123: Sprint 4 amendment では「EditorPane 側が空 paragraph fallback を担当」と記述していた. Sprint 5 amendment は EditorPane 廃止に伴い同責務を `FeedRow` に移管する. 旧定義は **superseded by REQ-FEED-031** とし...

context: Per the supersession table at line 917 ('EC-FEED-016 (Sprint 4 amendment) superseded by EC-FEED-016 Sprint 5 amendment') the Sprint 4 prose at line 695 is meant to be obsolete. But it remains in-place as the AC of REQ-FEED-024, which is itself only 'amended' by REQ-FEED-029 (subscriber rerouted, emit unchanged). A reader of REQ-FEED-024's edge-case section would still learn that 'EditorPane generates the fallback' which is no longer true. EditorPane no longer exists per REQ-FEED-028.
recommendedFix: Either (a) edit line 695 in-place to replace 'EditorPane receives focusedBlockId: null and generates a default empty paragraph block on its own initiative' with 'See EC-FEED-016 (Sprint 5 amendment) at line 1115 — FeedRow generates the fallback'; or (b) wrap line 695 in a strikethrough/superseded marker similar to how REQ-FEED-024 'Sprint 3 original payload shape (now superseded by Sprint 4)' is wrapped at line 643.
